title: New icons by Matik
description: A resource pack that changes the appearance of hearts, experience bars, hunger bar and underwater breathing bar.
body:
A resource pack that changes the appearance of hearts, experience bars, hunger bar and underwater breathing bar.

For now, the resource pack will change: Hearts and all their effects like wither, poison, freeze, golden hearts and all their alternatives in hardcore mode. Underwater breathing scale. Experience scale. Display network status. Armor display scale

the resource pack has been tested on versions 1.20.1 to 1.19, but the resource pack should work on all versions.


You can buy me a coffee here:
https://ko-fi.com/matikk
